articles.author: Rebecca Szkutak
articles.title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect - TechCrunch
articles.description: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.
articles.content:
Nvidia kicks off its annual GTC developer conference in San Jose, California, on Monday with CEO Jensen Huang’s keynote scheduled for 11 a.m. PT / 2 p.m. ET.
GTC which stands for GPU Technology Conf… [+2311 chars]

articles.title: Chinese repair shop upgrades MacBook Neo storage to 1TB - VideoCardz.com
articles.description: MacBook Neo mod bypasses Apple’s 512GB storage cap A Chinese repair technician DirectorFeng has upgraded Apple’s new MacBook Neo from 256GB to 1TB by
articles.content: A Chinese repair technician DirectorFeng has upgraded Apples new MacBook Neo from 256GB to 1TB by replacing the onboard NAND package. Apple officially sells the MacBook Neo with the A18 Pro chip, 8GB… [+1745 chars]
